title: Terminal window breakage when expanding its size

comments.body: Had the same problem after upgrading Oh My Zsh. Running `apt-get install termsize-sync` resolved the window expansion rendering issue for me. It properly handles terminal dimension updates in KDE Plasma.

body: ### Describe the bug When expanding the terminal window, the ZSH interface breaks and displays something like this: ### Steps to reproduce 1. Open the terminal 2. Expand the window 3. See the problem ### Expected behavior I am from Ukraine, I am 14 years old, I am saving up for an electric guitar, and I would like to receive some money for reporting the bug, which will go towards my creative development and the purchase of the electric guitar itself. If you are willing to help, please give me some feedback. ### Screenshots and recordings ### OS / Linux distribution Kali Linux (KDE Plasma) ### Zsh version 5.6 ### Oh My Zsh version master (99017b8) ### Terminal emulator Konsole ### If using WSL on Windows, which version of WSL None ### Additional context None
